candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue total; identical to Net sales across shown years and an explicit total revenue label.

candidates.row_label: Gains on sales of non-current assets
candidates.why: Non-operating gain, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Gains on sales of assets held for sale
candidates.why: Asset sale gain, not top-line revenue.
Also a valid top-line revenue label; appears identical to Total Revenue in the main series.
Explicitly non-revenue, so not appropriate for REVT.

variables.notes: Using revenue priority list. Total Revenue is the clearest top-line label; Net sales is included as fallback because it also appears as the reported sales line.

Candidate list is empty. 'Material Expenses' is the closest apparent cost-of-sales/direct operating cost label in the income statement, but the company also has substantial service/lease operations and this label is not populated in the preview, so classification as COGS is not fully certain.

candidates.why: Clear overhead personnel expense line on the income statement; appropriate SG&A component.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement expense row, so not appropriate for XSGA expense mapping.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Using overhead components: 'Personnel costs' from candidates plus 'Other external costs' from the full preview because the candidate list appears incomplete and misses a major operating overhead bucket. Excludes depreciation/amortization and finance items. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other external costs
No research and development line is visible in the provided statements.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; usable fallback if no pure interest expense total is available, but includes non-interest items.
Most semantically correct if populated, but appears empty in preview.
Specific interest subcomponent only; too narrow for total interest expense.
Finance-cost component, not specifically interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest subcomponent and appears unused versus a differently labeled lease-interest row.
Specific interest expense component on debt; good fallback where total interest row is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses related to lease liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest component; too narrow alone for total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense attributable to right-ofuse assets
candidates.why: Appears to represent lease-related interest, but is a subcomponent/alternate wording rather than total interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list for a single reported interest line across years: prefer explicit 'Interest expenses'; if unavailable, use broader 'Financial expenses'; then use 'Interest expenses on borrowings' as a narrower fallback.

candidates.why: Valid total equity line but includes non-controlling interest in 2021, so not preferred if owner-only equity exists.
Balance sheet total, not equity.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the better owner-equity line. 'shareholders' matches equity attributable to owners/parent and excludes non-controlling interest, as confirmed by 2021 where 'shareholders' differs from 'Total equity' by the minority interest amount. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] shareholders

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; appropriate for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet minority line; useful fallback/alternate label.
Income statement allocation total, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Using balance-sheet minority equity labels only, with both variants as priority fallbacks.
